headline: 3 public signals ready for the daily brief; 3 internal memos tracked separately.

entries.title: Agent interoperability keeps converging around MCP style contracts
entries.summary: Demo source describing a convergence trend around shared tool contracts, context exchange, and agent-to-agent interoperability.

entries.title: Responses API adds compaction and computer environment
entries.summary: Demo source covering agent runtime improvements, compaction, and computer environment support as a reusable foundation for production agents.

entries.title: Coding workflows keep stretching context and review loops
entries.summary: Demo source focused on coding-agent workflow upgrades, longer context handling, and review-oriented execution patterns.
